hotel_name: New Hampton Suits- Khách sạn trung tâm Tầm Xuân (New Hampton Suits-Tam Xuan Centre Hotel)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The place was around a 15-minute walk to the night market. We stayed in a room with 3 queen-size beds, and it was very spacious. There was no AC since the weather in Da Lat is already cold, but they provided 2 extra electric fans which made the room feel cool enough like the AC was on. There were also lots of eateries and coffee shops nearby, which made the location very convenient.

reviews.title: Large room with large windows overlooking main street.
reviews.positives:
The room was large and bright. 
24 hr reception.
Good value.
reviews.negatives: The shower head was a bit low for me and had to hold it by hand.

reviews.title: Value for money and spacious
reviews.text: The place was around a 15-minute walk to the night market. We stayed in a room with 3 queen-size beds, and it was very spacious. There was no AC since the weather in Da Lat is already cold, but they provided 2 extra electric fans which made the room feel cool enough like the AC was on. There were also lots of eateries and coffee shops nearby, which made the location very convenient.

reviews.title: They don't pay for their own mistakes but let the customers down
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: The hotel refused to let us check in after we had already walked 1 km with two heavy backpacks. They claimed the price was wrong, but that was not our fault. Then they told us there were no rooms available—clearly, they just didn’t want to admit our booking. The way they treated us was completely unacceptable. We had to waste time and energy booking another hotel!!!

reviews.title: Value for Money
reviews.text: The place was around a 15-minute walk to the night market. We stayed in a room with 3 queen-size beds, and it was very spacious. There was no AC since the weather in Da Lat is already cold, but they provided 2 extra electric fans which made the room feel cool enough like the AC was on. There were also lots of eateries and coffee shops nearby, which made the location very convenient.

reviews.title: Unpleasant staying
reviews.positives: N/A
reviews.negatives: Both rooms we stayed had bad mildew smells which was very uncomfortable to sleep.  We requested if they can change one of the room to different room however they refused.  The hotel didn’t provide complimentary water or coffee/tea.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
The hotel is nice, clean, and conveniently located near Chợ Đà Lạt, just about a 15-minute walk away. There’s also a mini grocery store nearby where you can buy basic necessities like drinks and snacks. The hotel has an elevator, which is very helpful if you have luggage. Our room was equipped with a small refrigerator and clean towels were provided.
The receptionists were very friendly and accommodating, especially Tang, who went the extra mile to help us find transportation back to Saigon. Overall, we had a pleasant and comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Very good Overall
reviews.positives:
Large beds
Good value for price
Central position
Big windows
Ventilated
reviews.negatives:
Payment Only cash
The Hall/reception a bit messy, they park motorbikes and even cars at night which is kinda funny

reviews.title: A comfortable accommodation experience.
reviews.text: The room is spacious, the bathroom is well-equipped, it provides convenient airport transportation, and it's easy to walk to nearby attractions. The cleanliness of the room is satisfactory. Although some facilities could be improved, overall, the staff is very friendly and helpful, giving us an enjoyable stay experience. The location is excellent and worth a try.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great very clean hotel. The lady at the reception is very helpful and speaks good English. They send it to me in one day.

reviews.title: Dalat 2026
reviews.text: Hotel right in the center, close to delicious and famous dining spots, convenient for transportation.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location, spacious room

reviews.title: Good Hospitality
reviews.text: Staffs are friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room and locatiin

reviews.title: Excellent hotel for the price!
reviews.text: Room was clean, and strategically located in the heart of dalat!

reviews.title: Impossible de dormir trop de bruit !!
reviews.positives: Emplacement et Check in tardif possible
reviews.negatives: Bruit toute la nuit ! Le patron de justifie en me disant qu’il a accueillit des étudiants et qu’il ne peut pas gérer leur bruit ! Dans ce cas là merci de prévenir les autres clients pour ne pas réserver chez vous!

reviews.title: Affordable - clean - convenient
reviews.text: Good price, very near Da Lat market, clean and have enough hot water.

reviews.title: Prima voor een nachtje vlakbij de stad, maar verwacht geen luxe
reviews.positives: Locatie is op loopafstand van de avondmarkt. Het is een ruime kamer, groot genoeg.
reviews.negatives: Geen warm water in de douche. Het is vergane glorie, veel achterstallig onderhoud. De prijs die we hadden afgesproken voor een taxi was een dag later een stuk duurder, hoe dan?

reviews.title: The hotel is fine.
reviews.text: The location is convenient for traveling, the hotel is not new but has all the necessary amenities. Given the price range, it is acceptable. A plus point is that the front desk staff (especially the male staff) are very helpful when needed.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: 浴室水量不足，有異味。

reviews.title: Fan cover with lots of dust
reviews.text: Even Dalat is a cool or cold place, but it’s necessary to inform whether the room has and air-con or fan in the room detail. I used to stayed in budget hotel in dalat before that have air-con so I don’t think this was an excuse. Even though, the fan in room cover by full of dust, it’s disgusting, it’s not only in my room, since I booked 7 rooms other rooms also the same it should be improved immediately on this. Actually I like the room that’s quite big and the location is good and the staffs are nice.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: K thick

reviews.title: Sangat berbaloi
reviews.text: Bilik besar, tempat- tempat menarik di Dalat pun berdekatan dengan hotel ini.Staf sangat baik dan mesra.Apa pun saya sangat berpuas hati.

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
reviews.positives: Vị trí tốt , nước nóng ổn phòng ổn
reviews.negatives: Cách phục vụ của nhân viên lê tân và ko thay drap giường khi ở 3 đêm chỉ gấp lại ko thay chỉ thay khăn nhưng có mùi . Có hỏi mướn xe lúc đầu nhưng sau 1 tiếng đã set up dc xe mới trả vẫn chấp nhận trả tiền xăng đã sử dụng nhưng vẫn ép khách trả hết cả ngày mướn xe : không ok về dịch vụ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good location, walking distance to city/night market, accessible to pick up tours, thank you so much

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: thuê xe tại khách sạn ko tốt, xe cũ và hư hỏng nhiều chỗ, nón bảo hiểm giao khách ko ktra, bị bung kính, vì lỗi nhỏ nên ko báo lại nhưng lúc trả thì bắt đền 100k. nói chung là khá bực bội

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good location, value for money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Quá ưng! Phòng sạch đẹp, giường êm, view chất lượng. Nv siêu nhiệt tình

reviews.title: The journey of youth
reviews.text: The room is quite small and not suitable for group travelers, it has no view, the staff are enthusiastic and friendly, and the prices are reasonable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng siu rộng rãi, sạch sẽ, view thì xịnNhân viên nhiệt tình, đúng gu mình

reviews.title: Would book again if a great deal
reviews.text: Only hotel in Da Lat so far where I was able to sleep with minimal neighborhood noise at night.  Being on the top floor may have something to do with it.  Best city view so far, and the wifi is blazing fast.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn sạch sẽ nhân viên dễ thương

reviews.title: Family
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and beautiful, but there is no parking. Parking costs 50,000 VND per day. In front of the hotel, parking for cars is prohibited, and we stopped for 5 minutes to load our luggage when the traffic police came to impose a fine, but the hotel staff did not come to help. We had to plead with the traffic police for understanding to be able to leave.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hệ thống nước nóng rất tốt
reviews.negatives: Vì ở vị trí trung tâm nên hơi ồn

reviews.title: An amazing vacation when choosing a wonderful hotel.
reviews.text: Room right in the center, on a main street, can accommodate a 16-seater vehicle. The room is clean, spacious, and has cool windows. Very reasonable price. Friendly staff. I will definitely come back on the next vacation.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng rãi sạch sẽ thoáng nhân viên nhiệt tình vui vẻ
reviews.negatives: Gối cao và không thoải mái, cửa nhà vệ sinh bằng gỗ hay bị kẹt phải dùng sức kéo

reviews.title: Evaluate hotel services
reviews.text: The hotel is in a very good location. There are many dining areas nearby. The room is spacious. However, there is no complimentary bottled water in the room.

reviews.title: Khách sạn ổn áp, ko chỗ nào để chê
reviews.positives: Ở đây phải nói là quá xịn, phòng rộng rãi, sạch bóng, giường êm cực luôn. đội ngũ staff siêu siêu dễ thương, hỗ trợ nhiệt tình ko ngại gì hết. Đặc biệt vị trí tiện ghê, đi chơi hay công việc gì cũng nhanh gọn. Nói chung là 10/10, lần sau ghé chắc chắn lại chọn chỗ này!

reviews.title: satisfaction
reviews.text: It was very noisy because of the window side, but the hygiene and room size were okay for the price. The location is also good because it's close to the night market. I requested to replace the showerhead because it wasn't good, and they did it quickly. I think it would be fine as long as the towels are in good condition.

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm đáng nhớ, service tốt
reviews.positives: Ở đây thích thật sự, staff chu đáo hết nấc, gặp ai cũng niềm nở. Phòng mới, sạch sẽ, decor sang chảnh. Vị trí quá tiện, đi ăn uống hay dạo chơi đều gần xịt. Giá hợp lý mà dịch vụ thì xịn sò, không có gì để chê, chắc chắn sẽ ghé lại nếu có dịp

reviews.title: It's not very clean.
reviews.text: Towels were stained and dirty. Not recommended.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Dịch vụ khách sạn tốt

reviews.title: A place focused solely on cost-effectiveness.
reviews.text:
I unexpectedly came into a windfall while hoping for a 20,000 won bill. 

The staff is extremely friendly. The room condition is clean, though not at a five-star hotel level. There was a gold and silver shop nearby with an excellent exchange rate. 
I highly recommend it, and I encourage others to visit as well.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng clean, tiện nghi đầy đủ, không gian thoải mái.

reviews.title: Grandma's house
reviews.text: For the purpose of booking close to the Cái Răng floating market, this is a very good choice. The host is enthusiastic and kind.

reviews.title: Vị trí thuận tiện
reviews.positives: Khách sạn cách Hồ Xuân Hương và Quảng trường Lâm Viên vài phút đi bộ

reviews.title: Not bad
reviews.text: Not bad

reviews.title: chỉ là chỗ để ngủ
reviews.positives: địa điểm tốt, có cho thuê xe máy
reviews.negatives: phòng nhỏ, khá ngộp, không cách âm

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is located right in the center of Da Lat, very convenient for moving around, basic amenities, large bed and quite comfortable. The room I booked is a deluxe double room, which is not very spacious because there is no view and no large windows. If you're just looking to rest and don't intend to take photos here, it's fine. The price is reasonable, and if you check in early, an additional 100k is quite acceptable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng sach đẹp không ẩm mốc
